ddls:
CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "blurb" TEXT /* Brief description of the campaign */,
  "goal" REAL /* Funding goal of the campaign */,
  "pledged" REAL /* Total amount pledged to the campaign */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the campaign (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "backers_count" INTEGER /* Number of backers of the campaign */,
  "average_donation" REAL /* Average donation amount of the campaign */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the campaign is located */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the campaign */,
  "launched_at" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp when the campaign was launched */,
  "deadline" INTEGER /* Unix timestamp when the campaign deadline is */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the campaign was created */,
  "date_ended" TEXT /* Date when the campaign ended */,
  "staff_pick" INTEGER /* Whether the campaign is a staff pick */,
  "spotlight" INTEGER /* Whether the campaign is spotlighted */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date when the campaign was launched */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the campaign will end */,
  "funding_duration" INTEGER /* Funding duration of the campaign in days */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., live, expired, canceled) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the campaign is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_currency FOREIGN KEY ("currency") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of the category (e.g., primary, sub) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_categories" (
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-category */,
  "sub_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sub-category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_categories" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sub-category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id", "category_id", "sub_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code of the currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate of the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., creator, backer, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_creators" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the campaign (e.g., creator, manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backers" (
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backer */,
  "backer_name" TEXT /* Name of the backer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the backer */,
  "pledge_amount" REAL /* Total pledge amount of the backer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pledges" (
  "pledge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pledge */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the backer */,
  "pledge_amount" REAL /* Amount of the pledge */,
  "pledge_date" TEXT /* Date of the pledge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pledge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pledges_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pledges_backer_id FOREIGN KEY ("backer_id") REFERENCES backers ("backer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "update_text" TEXT /* Text of the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of the update (e.g., news, warning) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_updates_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "reward_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "reward_price" REAL /* Price of the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faqs" (
  "faq_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FAQ */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "question" TEXT /* Question of the FAQ */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Answer of the FAQ */,
  "faq_type" TEXT /* Type of the FAQ (e.g., general, reward) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faqs_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date of the comment */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of the comment (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_analytics" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "pledge_count" INTEGER /* Number of pledges made to the campaign */,
  "pledge_amount" REAL /* Total pledge amount of the campaign */,
  "backer_count" INTEGER /* Number of backers of the campaign */,
  "average_donation" REAL /* Average donation amount of the campaign */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Success rate of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., campaign update, pledge) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_deadlines" (
  "deadline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deadline */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "deadline_date" TEXT /* Date of the deadline */,
  "deadline_type" TEXT /* Type of the deadline (e.g., funding, submission) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deadline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_deadlines_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date of the reminder */,
  "reminder_text" TEXT /* Text of the reminder */,
  "reminder_type" TEXT /* Type of the reminder (e.g., funding, submission) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_reminders_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)
